props.title: History
props.description: The eras, named years, and remembered events of Myrdae.

props.title: Ages of Myrdae
props.description: A visual era bar for the major historical periods. Expand the era folds below for the year-by-year record.

props.content: Click an era below to expand the history notes.

props.title: The Awakening: 1227 to Present
props.description: A prominent period of adventure, divine upheaval, rebuilding, and discovery after the old gods abandoned Myrdae.
props.foldText:
1246 - Year of Discovery
A prominent period of adventure, where it was common to see people travel the land having gained comfort in the new gods of Myrdae.
- Heroes were collected to re-establish the lost domain in the Mahruud.

1240 - Year of Emergence
- Denizens of the Underdark are found more frequently on the surface.

1237 - Year of Harboring
- The Soul Reaper gathers the souls lost during the Awakening under his command.

1229 - Year of Convergence
- Empowered by the magical weave of Myrdae, Tegenwald is re-established as a prominent land in the Bathaen Empire.

1228 - Year of Enlightenment
- Several additional deities rose to prominence in the world of Myrdae.
- Torn settlements were rebuilt and people relocated to form new hamlets and towns.

1227 - Year of Abandonment
- A transition to a new era in Myrdae, known as The Awakening.
- Prayers from the 8 major deities, Athuel, Bellum, Disgar, Lyess, Neera, Smott, Tiash and Torec, were no longer being answered as these gods abandoned the people of Myrdae.
- Previous lesser deities rose in power and were joined by other notable deities that were previously only recognized in estranged sects.
- The new pantheon order were recognized by the clergy of the land and labeled as Ameliorate Divine, or more commonly called the New Order.
- Muerg the Earth Father called upon his champion Ashe and several primordials to repair the torn land.
- For a harmon, Ashe led these earthen mights to fill the Great Cravasse.
- It did not come without other impact to the land, as such force erected mountains and moved islands.
- It was a fingerprint on the material world that only a champion like Ashe could leave.

props.title: Era of Ascendance: 1111 to 1226 AF
props.description: The long rise toward the Awakening: prophecy, planar travel, villains, the Thornage line, and the final threats of the old era.
props.foldText:
1226 - Year of Fending
The people of Myrdae had to fend off an attack or defend themselves against a great rising threat that came during the Year of Rising.
- 22nd of Luros - Di'Belgi summons Meresse Noakes, influencing the outcome of the Rising Harmony.
- 30th of Evalee - Nethyndria captures the Regulators.

1225 - Year of Rising
The year that several key villains rose to take over the land: Di'Belgi the demon lord, Itoro the chronomancer, Nethyndria the dracolich, Suthrin and Tol'behgekt.
- 5th of Kesero - Tor Gulkta secures the doctor's services for Phrogg's soul.
- 14th of Kesero - Ki'rin Behki sends Xel to set in motion the Rising Harmony.
- 1st of Nessare - Elyra re-establishes the Eradic of Ghone, a following of Si'julous.
- 4th of Talil - The red dragon Socurenth is defeated by the group known as the Plane Shifters.

1224 - Year of Being
- Suthrin is released from the hells through the Laztyr.
- Thalex Stormvigor consults with Avant Sinestia Thornage.
- It is determined the Astereal Accord needs to be reformed.

1223 - Year of Deliverance
- Sinestia Thornage becomes Avant at the age of 31.
- Sinestia is the first successor to Avant in the Thornage bloodline.

1222 - Year of Atrophy
- Evil becomes more prevalent across Myrdae.
- Avant Mathaen Knot is found to be corrupt.
- Mathaen Knot is stripped of the title Avant.

1221 - Year of Eviction
- Itoro Gradel emerges, sending people from Myrdae to other planes and timelines.

1220 - Year of Recognition
- Meress Noakes leaves the apprenticeship of Yibrix.
- Meress settles in Stouhg.

1219 - Year of Blood
- A second coup in the Mahruud is organized, killing Tor Brom.
- Gulkta becomes the Tor of the Mahruud.

1218 - Year of Imminence
- Mathean Knot is recognized as the new Avant.
- Gulkta defies odds, winning a staged arena battle.

1217 - Year of Unrest
- Avant Istoria Gi and Sinestia once again leave Myrdae.
- Only Sinestia returns.

1212 - Year of Ovation
- Avant Istoria Gi and Sinestia return to the Agent Halls after traveling to another plane.

1211 - Year of Affluence
- The lands are rich and blessed by Bellum, the goddess of life.
- Crops and livestock flourish, mining caves prove rich.

1210 - Year of Tranquility
- There has been a decade of peace on the mainland.
- The year is recognized for Fralee, the deity of Tranquility.
- As a result, Fralee acquires a huge following.

1209 - Year of Absence
- Sinestia becomes the youngest Avantee at age 17.
- Avant Istoria Gi takes Sinestia on planar travel for learning.
- Sinestia learns of the Pact of the Planes and the Planar Council.

1206 - Year of Erudition
- Sinestia enters the Argent Halls.
- Avant Istoria Gi takes Sinestia as an apprentice.

1205 - Year of the Prodigy
- Sinestia becomes known as the Thornage Prodigy.
- Corebb Keep is fully constructed.

1200 - Year of Stability
- Order is prominent across the land.
- Outlaws are driven out or move to underground networks.

1199 - Year of Incursion
- Last recorded year of the greater deities visiting Myrdae.
- Many civilized areas struggle with order.
- Bandits plague the highways; pirates rule the seas.

1194 - Year of Access
- Gulkta is born into a slave ring.
- The Tether Core decide to retire on Myrdae.
- The Astereal Accord is ended as a guardian organization.
- The Tether Core begin construction on Corebb Keep.

1193 - Year of Parting
- The evil chronomancer, Itoro Gradel, is defeated.
- This is done by the Tether Core of the Astereal Accord.

1192 - Year of the Oracle
- The Prophecy of the Auspicious.
- Sinestia Thornage is born.

1123 - Year of Lunacy
- Zibeus, a mage from Orbansia, becomes mad.
- The mad mage spreads chaos, killing hundreds.
- The Bathaen Empire begins requiring a Caster's Grant.

1111 - Year of Turning
- Sages across the land prophesize a clash of heroes.

props.title: Cycle of Change: 942 AF to 1110 AF
props.description: A shorter recorded cycle marked by exile and liberation from demonic pressure below the world.
props.foldText:
1078 - Year of Exile
- Thrargael?s guards organize a coup that fails.
- They are exiled to the island of Kabn?sh.

942 - Year of Liberation
- Myrdae claims success in having pushed back the demonic threat of the Underdark.

props.title: Time of Growth: 0 to 941 AF
props.description: The first age after the Fracturing, when empires rose, calendars formed, and the Crungess shaped the surface world.
props.foldText:
567 - Year of Blight
- Evil woodland creatures appear across the Mahruud.
- These creatures are referred to as The Broken.

500 - Year of Pleasantries
- No monstrosities have emerged from the Crungess in 50 years.
- Sentries are recognized as Sentinels of Myrdae.

450 - Year of Cease
- Monstrosities from the Crungess are considered at bay.

373 - Year of Form
- Basctdelm becomes the capital of the Bathaen Empire.
- Gibuldon becomes the capital of Inverland.
- Thrargael becomes the capital of the Mahruud.

329 - Year of Dignity
- The Bathaen Empire recognizes three empires in its land.
- Inverland recognizes Vecs as representatives.

50 - Year of Endurance
- Monstrosities arise from the Crungess.
- Provinces send forces to protect the surface.
- The Meridian leads the defense with the angel Zariel.
- The Meridian rode into the depths of the Underdark.
- Some of the Meridian stayed behind and were cursed.
- The cursed defenders were referred to as the Revenir.

15 - Year of Runes
- Di'Belgi develops the arcane art of Rune Weaving.
- How to Rune Weave is written by Yibrix in a tome.

5 - Year of Deceit
- The demon De'Belgi fools the angel Amriel.
- Together they steal the Crown of Lyess.

4 - Year of Designation
- Asterin Thornage begins consulting with a prophet.
- This prophet becomes the Harbiter.
- A Harbiter names the year and judge of things to come.
- Padora Fallowood is recognized as the first Harbiter.

3 - Year of Marking
- The harmon calendar is created by Asterin Thornage.
- The calendar corresponds to the Fracturing.

1 - Year of Fracturing
- It is said that Neera threw Brault from the heavens.
- This is known as the Fracturing.
- The Crungess, also known as Great Crevasse, was created.
- The neighboring areas were destroyed and buried in rubble.
- It is also believed to have ended the Great War.

props.title: Pre-Fracturing (PF)
props.description: Events remembered before the harmon calendar and the creation of the Crungess.
props.foldText:
23 PF - Wood Elf Departure
- Shunned by high elves, the wood elves leave the Bathaen Empire.

51 PF - Birth of Suthrin
- Suthrin, son of Brault and Tornia, is said to have been born this day.

77 PF - Death of Threan Maul
- The Tor of the Mahruud, Threan Maul, dies during the War of Might.

100 PF - War of Might Begins
- The beginning of the War of Might, between the Bathaen Empire and the Mahruud.

500 PF - Harsh Times in the Mahruud
- Harsh times strike the Mahruud, transforming it into a barbaric land.

900 PF - Inverland Recognized
- Inverland recognized as an empire, known as a province at the time.
